dev-setup-cleanup.title: Identity, dev process & repo cleanup — establish LSH as the product, set up workflow, fix stale code
dev-setup-cleanup.notes: Three layers: (1) Identity rewrite — this is the Latent Space Hub, not a demo of RA-H. (2) Dev process — recreate the proven RA-H workflow (.claude/, skills, branching, PRD-gating). (3) Code cleanup — false vector comments, ghost model names, stale docs. Absorbs PRD-03 (naming audit).

tasks.text: Rewrite README.md — LSH is the product, not a demo
Rewrite CLAUDE.md — Turso reality, correct architecture, dev workflow
Update system prompts (rah-easy.ts, rah-main.ts) — 'Latent Space Hub', not 'ra-h'
Complete MCP tool rename (rah_* → ls_*) in server.js
Fix RA-H references in ExternalAgentsPanel.tsx and sqliteQuery.ts
Create .claude/ — settings.json, commands/, skills/ (plan, dev, finish)
Move backlog to docs/development/backlog/backlog.json — kept at current location
Fix chunks.ts — remove false 'vector not supported' comments
Fix sqlite-vec.ts — remove false 'not usable in Turso' comments
Fix sqlite-client.ts — checkVectorExtension() should not return false
Fix model names in paperExtract, websiteExtract, youtubeExtract (gpt-5-mini → gpt-4o-mini)
Fix pricing.ts — remove non-existent model pricing
Clean up docs (schema, overview, troubleshooting, taxonomy archive)
Verify end-to-end: create a feature branch, follow the workflow, merge

schema-and-port.title: Schema cleanup + port RA-H changes — finalize DB structure, bring across recent UX improvements
schema-and-port.notes:
66 commits on main RA-H app in last 3 weeks. Schema changes (content→notes, event_date, drop dead cols) + UX (Table Pane, Feed simplification). Do in one batch.

Key constraint: Schema is painful to change later. Get it right.

tasks.text: Drop dead columns (nodes.type, is_pinned, edges.user_feedback, chat_memory_state)
Add FTS5 virtual table on chunks.text

enable-vector-search.title: Enable vector search — wire up Turso native vector_top_k, add FTS5, hybrid search
enable-vector-search.notes:
Confirmed working on Turso 2026-02-19. Code is stubbed with LIKE fallback. Need to replace with real vector_top_k() + add FTS5 + RRF hybrid.

Depends on: schema-and-port

content-ingestion.title: Content ingestion — backfill all podcasts, blogs, ainews + auto-ingest pipeline
content-ingestion.notes:
204 nodes exist but 0 chunks. Phase 1: podcasts + blogs. Phase 2: 570+ ainews. Phase 3: auto-ingest.

Depends on: schema-and-port, enable-vector-search

tasks.text: Scope: total podcast episodes on YouTube
Scope: total blog posts on Substack

mcp-server-and-skills.title: MCP server (NPX) + skills/guides — publishable package, shared interface for humans and bots
mcp-server-and-skills.notes:
Make the MCP server an NPX package (like ra-h-mcp-server). Add skills/guides system that ships with the server. Same interface for humans (Claude Code/Desktop) and Discord bots. Bot imports service layer directly.

Depends on: dev-setup-cleanup, schema-and-port, enable-vector-search, content-ingestion
Blocks: discord-bot

tasks.text: Port node/edge/dimension/chunk services to standalone JS
Write system guides (start-here, schema, creating-nodes, edges, dimensions, search, content-types)
Add config/auth handling (env vars + config file)

discord-bot.title: Discord bots — Sig & Slop, dual-personality bots backed by LS knowledge base
discord-bot.notes:
Two bots from day one. Sig (precise, factual, cites sources) and Slop (unhinged, hot takes, debate starter). Same KB, different personalities.

Architecture: OpenClaw-style Discord gateway — single Node.js process, thread-per-conversation. No complex MD workspace files — bots pull everything from the LS knowledge base. System prompt + KB search = their entire world.

Both react to new content, debate each other, and draw community members into threads.

Depends on: schema-and-port, enable-vector-search, content-ingestion, mcp-server-and-skills

tasks.text: Discord.js gateway — single process routing to both bots

Slop system prompt — unhinged, hot takes, confrontational
